title: Exercise Study Article for BC Recurrence Prevention
body:
I think post-treatment we’re all looking for answers when it comes to recurrence.

This isn’t really new news because the medical community has been on this, but this article talks in simple terms about the exercises yielding the most benefits and the methods used to study them. 

Essentially, high intensity exercise for about 45 minutes including warm up and cool down produces a protein called IL-6 in our blood that kills cancer cells. 

https://wapo.st/47EINFQ - WaPo Gift Article

https://archive.ph/QGQTL - Archive Version
